en: Can you fix this sentence There are so much crowd in the city center
ko: 이 문장 고칠 수 있어? There are so much crowd in the city center

en: We use much with uncountable nouns These are nouns which we can't count like
ko: much는 불가산명사에 써. 셀 수 없는 명사, 예를 들면

en: sand or water I drank too much coffee We use many with countable
ko: 모래나 물. 커피를 너무 많이 마셨어. many는 가산명사에

en: nouns These are nouns that we can count like cars or books I
ko: 써. 셀 수 있는 명사, 예를 들면 자동차나 책. 읽을

en: have so many books to read Crowd is a countable noun meaning a large group of
ko: 책이 너무 많아. crowd는 많은 사람들의 무리를 뜻하는 가산명사야

en: people We can count groups of people so we use many So let's fix that
ko: 사람 무리를 셀 수 있으니까 many를 써. 그럼 문장을 고쳐보자

en: There are so many crowds in the city center We can also change crowd into an adjective
ko: There are so many crowds in the city center. crowd를 형용사로 바꿔서

en: the city center is so crowded Can you use much and many in a sentence of your own
ko: the city center is so crowded. much와 many를 써서 문장을 만들어봐
